query:
SELECT 
  p.id as productId,
  p.sku as productSku,
  p.name as productName,
  pv.id as variantId,
  pv.variantCode
FROM products p
JOIN product_variants pv ON p.id = pv.productId
WHERE p.sku != SUBSTRING(pv.variantCode, 1, LOCATE('-V', pv.variantCode) - 1)
ORDER BY p.id, pv.id;

ORDER BY p.id, pv.id;
